nasb.text: On the top of the stand there was a circular form half a cubit high, and on the top of the stand its stays and its borders were part of it.

esv.text: And on the top of the stand there was a round band half a cubit high; and on the top of the stand its stays and its panels were of one piece with it.

cnv.text: 盆座頂上有一個圓圈，高二十二公分；在盆座頂的座的撐子和邊緣是與座一塊鑄成的。

ccb.text: 盆座上有一个高二十三厘米的圆架，上面的支架和镶板是和盆座一起铸成的。
